# Chapter 13: Near-misses and weak signals  (~80 pp)
- 13.1 Why near-misses are the cheap data (10) · 13.2 Reporting cultures: aviation ASRS, medical reporting (12) · 13.3 Weak-signal recognition (12) · 13.4 The HRO posture (12) · 13.5 Anomaly detection from operational data (12) · 13.6 Failure section: organisations that ignored weak signals; ATR-72 icing, Comair 5191 (22)
